evals.prompt: Run `concepts explore --no-browser` and verify it starts an HTTP server
evals.expected: Server starts on port 9474 (or custom port) and prints URL

evals.prompt: With cortex installed and concepts.db populated, fetch http://127.0.0.1:9474/api/graph
evals.expected: JSON response with concepts array, edges array, and summary object
evals.criteria: Response is valid JSON containing 'concepts' (array), 'edges' (array), and 'summary' (object with concept/edge counts)

evals.prompt: Open the graph explorer at http://127.0.0.1:9474/ and describe what you see
evals.expected: D3 force-directed graph with colored nodes, edges, labels, and a control panel
evals.criteria: HTML page loads D3.js, renders SVG with circle elements (nodes) and line elements (edges), has a search input and filter checkboxes

evals.prompt: In the explorer, type a concept name in the search box
evals.expected: Only matching concepts remain visible, others are hidden
evals.criteria: Search input filters visible nodes by name substring match

evals.prompt: In the explorer, drag the time slider to the left
evals.expected: Graph shows fewer concepts and edges (only those that existed at that point in time)
evals.criteria: Time slider filters graph by first_seen date. Moving left hides newer concepts. Play button animates through time

evals.prompt: Click a concept node in the explorer
evals.expected: The clicked node and its neighbors are highlighted, others are dimmed
evals.criteria: Clicking a node increases opacity of the node and connected neighbors, dims all others

evals.prompt: Click a concept in the explorer and use the Rename button
evals.expected: Modal appears with text input, submitting renames the concept and refreshes the graph
evals.criteria: Rename modal appears, accepts new name, POSTs to /api/correct, page reloads with updated name

evals.prompt: Click a concept and use the Flag incorrect button
evals.expected: Concept is added to correction-queue.json for /review to surface
evals.criteria: Flag action POSTs to /api/flag, creates or appends to correction-queue.json, shows confirmation

evals.prompt: With 5+ connected concepts, check if cluster boundaries appear in the explorer
evals.expected: Connected components are outlined with semi-transparent colored hulls
evals.criteria: Explorer fetches /api/clusters and renders convex hull overlays around connected components with 2+ members

evals.prompt: Run /reflect and check how it accesses graph data
evals.expected: /reflect uses CLI queries (concepts --json shared, hot, stale, graph) instead of reflect-context.json
evals.criteria: The /reflect skill does NOT reference reflect-context.json. It runs CLI commands directly for graph data

evals.prompt: With concepts A-B-C where A and C both connect to B and D, run concepts co-occurs A
evals.expected: Returns C as co-occurring with A, sharing neighbors B and D
evals.criteria: co-occurs subcommand correctly identifies concepts sharing 2+ common neighbors and lists the shared neighbors

evals.prompt: Run concepts hooks install and verify the result
evals.expected: Scripts written to ~/.claude/scripts/, hooks added to settings.json
evals.criteria: Three scripts installed (review-check.sh, reflect-gate.sh, reflect-surface.sh). settings.json updated with SessionStart and Stop hooks
